rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Even if you are the safety device, if I
eradicate you while you are still wooden dolls![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Notification from the Central
Life Control System.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0006
rows.name:
This unit is under attack from hostile action.
Initiating internal defense system now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0007
rows.name:
That brain guy... Is he trying
to destroy the control system!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0009
rows.name: Do not speak my name so lightly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Do you mean to say we are the cancer
cells!? I won't let us be destroyed![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Everyone, stop him! At this rate,
the control system will...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0017
rows.name:
The system that cultivates Earth's immigrants also
serves as a defense mechanism, creating biological weapons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Those[ST:wide ]— Those monsters are
the defense mechanism[ST:wide ]—?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0020
rows.name:
The system is running wild.
We have to stop it quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0022
rows.name:
Its form is ugly, just
like you Earthlings![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0023
rows.name: I don't want to hear that from you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12120100_MSG0027
rows.name:
Leave this guy to me! You all
stop the defense system![ST:wait ]
